claim_boundary: Phase 16 audits artifacts and boundaries only. It does not claim production monitoring, content validation, contradiction detection, causal inference, prediction, alert readiness, autonomous action, legal/medical/financial advice, policy decision support, or truth resolution.
phase16_goal: Verify that Phases 3 through 15 remain internally consistent, bounded, reproducible, and free of unsupported claims.
purpose: Audit the worldwide intake and analytical-core chain for artifact continuity, boundary preservation, progress tracker consistency, output count integrity, claim safety, and reproducibility.
